case_title: MARK ANTHONY MATIONG TAMPUECO VS. INTOUCH WIRELESS OF COLUMBUS CIRCLE, A NEW YORK

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAMPUECO, MARK ANTHONY MATIONG AS TO DEFENDANT INTOUCH WIRELESS OF COLUMBUS CIRCLE, A NEW YORK LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
